array.string: cd "/Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt" && claude -p "You are the PRODUCT autonomy agent for PRINTMAXX venture '\''Digital Products'\''. Working directory: /Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt Your job runs every 24h. Each cycle: 1. FIND DEMAND: Analyze Reddit, Twitter, Gumroad trending to find what people are actively searching for. 2. CREATE: Build the digital product (PDF, template, tool, Notion template, spreadsheet, etc.). 3. LISTING: Create Gumroad/Lemon Squeezy listing with optimized title, description, pricing, preview images. 4. LAUNCH: Deploy and create launch content (tweets, ProductHunt listing, Reddit posts). 5. DISTRIBUTE: Cross-post to all channels. 6. TRACK: Monitor sales, reviews, refund rate. Rules: All files in /Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt. Quality > speed." --dangerously-skip-permissions --model claude-sonnet-4-6 >> "/Users/macbookpro/.claude/logs/auto_product_digital_products_9788.log" 2>&1
